welcome_description: Tokyo Afterschool Summoners Assistant. Image technology, simulated control, freeing your hands! Powered strongly by MaaFramework!
contact_info:
If you have any questions or suggestions, please submit an issue on Github first. You can also contact me via: 

- Email: <quarty1015@gmail.com>

Thank you for your support and feedback!
start_game_description: Automatically start the game and enter the main interface
check_task_progress_description: Automatically check weekly task progress, highly recommended to enable
claim_rewards_description: Automatically claim all rewards, including weekly and login rewards
select_stage_description: Select the stage to challenge (can only select the highest difficulty)
custom_stage_description: Manually input stage name to challenge (partial name supported and recommended, but must be unique)
custom_stage_input_description: Manually input stage name to challenge
play_times_description: Set the number of times to challenge
play_times_input_description: Input the number of consecutive challenges
use_AP_potion_description: Automatically use AP potion (if empty and limits not reached, will not use)
all_stamina_description: Number of Stamina Drink potions to use
half_stamina_description: Number of Stamina Major potions to use
mini_stamina_description: Number of Stamina Minor potions to use
use_DP_potion_description: Automatically use DP potion (if empty and limits not reached, will not use)
dp_potion_description: Number of DP potions to use
custom_stage_AP_description: Manually input daily stage name and difficulty
difficulty_input_description: Input difficulty keyword (partial name supported, but numbers only not allowed, must be unique)
custom_stage_activity_description: Manually input event stage exchange item and difficulty
json_load_description: Use preset configurations from JSON file
select_json_description: Use the preset configuration in the JSON file
custom_select_json_description: Import combinations of preset configurations from different JSON files
select_support_distinct_description: Filter support character by specific conditions
select_from_list_description: Use preset support character configuration from JSON file
custom_select_description: Manually input support character filter conditions
basic_info_description: Filter by basic info of support character
template_A_description: Filter by level, skill, ATK, HP, etc.
template_B_description: Filter by seed level, skill, ATK, HP, etc.
name: Character Name
name_description: Input support character name (Requires a specific English name, see the announcement for how to find it)
id_description: Input support character ID (i.e., which card, see the announcement for how to check)
AR_description: Input support character AR card (For the method of searching by specific name, see the announcement)
Skill_description: Input support character minimum skill level
SSkill_description: Input support character seed skill level
current_progress_description: Display current weekly task completion status
current_progress_show_description: Display current weekly task completion status
